prepositions_phrasal_verbs_prepositions_.name: prepositions phrasal verbs prepositions of movement all levels

questions.question: Choose the destination preposition: We walked {a1} the museum.
Choose the movement-inside preposition: She walked {a1} the room.
Choose the movement-to-surface preposition: The cat jumped {a1} the sofa.
Choose the movement-out preposition: He came {a1} the house.
Choose the path preposition: We drove {a1} the tunnel.
Choose the crossing preposition: They walked {a1} the bridge.
Choose the line/path preposition: We walked {a1} the river.
Choose the passing preposition: The bus went {a1} the school.
Choose the direction preposition: She ran {a1} the door.
Choose the circular movement preposition: We walked {a1} the lake.
Choose movement, not static place: The dog ran {a1} the garden.
Avoid the mistake: She got {a1} the car and drove away.
